title: ferray-stride-tricks: overlap check enumerates all offsets — O(n) memory for large views
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

has_overlapping_strides() in overlap_check.rs uses a HashSet of all offsets to detect duplicates — O(n) memory and O(n) time where n is the total number of elements. For views with > 1M elements this is expensive. NumPy's as_strided doesn't check for overlaps at all (it's always 'unsafe' in NumPy). For ferray's safe variant, a mathematical stride analysis (GCD-based) could detect overlap in O(ndim^2) time without enumeration for many common patterns. The HashSet approach is correct but could be optimized.
